productDisplayName: Peter England Men Printed Blue TShirt
description: Composition Teal blue T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash inside out with like colours, using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry falt in shade Warm iron Go cheeky, get stylish with this T-shirt from peter england's Oddies collection. With an odd graphic of God and a crazy pricing of three sins per minute, it's a great way to spread the cheer. Pair it with denims or shorts, and add on floaters or sneakers.
